allow: PowerShell(try { $page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/drops" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $scripts = [regex]::Matches\($page.Content, 'src="\([^"]+\)"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }; $scripts | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "  -> OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "  -> FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/_0femr03._.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $content = $r.Content; $idx = $content.IndexOf\("DropsPage"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 500\); $content.Substring\($start, [Math]::Min\(3000, $content.Length - $start\)\) } else { "DropsPage not found in chunk" })

PowerShell($pages = @\("/", "/faq", "/tips", "/brokes", "/pokedex", "/drops", "/medals", "/boost", "/gyms", "/dungeons", "/rockets", "/tasks"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { "$p -> FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Thiago\\source\\repos\\PKA"; $csv = Import-Csv "data\\tierlist_raw.csv"; $json = $csv | Where-Object { $_.Pokemon -and $_.Pokemon.Trim\(\) -ne "" } | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ pokemon = $_.Pokemon.Trim\(\); tier = $_.Tier.Trim\(\); moveset = $_.Moveset.Trim\(\) } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("data\\tierList.json", $json, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $data = Get-Content "data\\tierList.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total entries: $\($data.Count\)"; $data | Select-Object -Last 5 | Format-Table -AutoSize; "Unique movesets:"; $data | ForEach-Object { $_.moveset } | Sort-Object -Unique)
